title: Building a playlist by inserting songs

content.problemStatement:
- In this example, we demonstrate how to use the `insert()` method in C++ to insert a new element at a specific position in a vector. The `insert()` method allows us to add elements to the vector at any index without overwriting existing elements.

- In this example, we insert an element at the **second position** in the vector, between two existing elements.

---

**When executed, the code will show:**

```java
Before insert: 10 20 30 40 50
After insert: 10 25 20 30 40 50
```
